TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cirocan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 282 buwan, 699 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 44% kyan ku 308 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 56% kyan ku 391 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 47%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirocan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cirocan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirocan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirocan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cirocan hya' ga Atolan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cirocan ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa atolan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cirocan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Hamicho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 282 buwan, 699 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 44% kyan ku 308 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 56% kyan ku 391 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 47%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cirocan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Cirocan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cirocan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cirocan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Cirocan hya' ga Atolan. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cirocan ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ħamiʦ~ʨħo ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ħjaʔ ɣa atolan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiroʦ~ʨan ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo maki * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
